title: cyclophorus calvatus
intro: Cyclophorus calvatus, also known as the "Giant Cyclophorus" or "Wild Yam", is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Convolvulaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Cyclophorus calvatus include relief from menstrual cramps, nausea, and other symptoms associated with PMS, as well as potential anti-cancer properties. Herbal preparations of Cyclophorus calvatus can be found in various forms, including dried roots, teas, and capsules, which can be used to support women's health and well-being.
